id.description: The unique identifier for the schedule.

createTime.description: The time the schedule was created.

updateTime.description: The time the schedule was last updated.

createdBy.description: The user who created the schedule.

updatedBy.description: The user who last updated the schedule.

interval.description: The recurrence interval (e.g., None, Daily, Weekly, Monthly).

frequency.description: How often the schedule repeats within the interval.

timezone.description: The time zone for the schedule.

rangeStartTime.description: The start of the time range within each day.

rangeEndTime.description: The end of the time range within each day.

dayOfWeek.description: The day(s) of the week for weekly schedules (e.g., Mon, Tue, Wed).

dayOfMonth.description: The day of the month for monthly schedules.
